clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [SUPPLIER_NAME] ("Supplier") and [RESELLER_NAME] ("Reseller").
This Agreement covers the resale of [PRODUCT_NAME] by the Reseller to end customers.

The Supplier shall sell [PRODUCT_NAME] to the Reseller at [WHOLESALE_PRICE]. The Reseller may set its own resale price to end customers, subject to any resale price guidance the Supplier provides, which shall not be binding unless required by applicable law.

The Reseller shall purchase or sell at least [MINIMUM_SALES_VOLUME] of [PRODUCT_NAME] during each [MINIMUM_SALES_PERIOD]. Failure to meet this commitment entitles the Supplier to convert the Reseller's status under the Exclusive Territory Clause to non-exclusive.
Within the territory defined in the Territory Clause, the Supplier shall not appoint another reseller for [PRODUCT_NAME], provided the Reseller continues to meet the Minimum Sales Clause.

The Supplier grants the Reseller a limited, non-exclusive, revocable license to use the Supplier's trademarks and brand materials solely to market and resell [PRODUCT_NAME], in accordance with the Supplier's brand guidelines.

The Reseller shall not alter the Supplier's trademarks or use them in a manner that could damage the Supplier's brand reputation. The Supplier may revoke the license granted under the Brand Usage License Clause upon written notice if the Reseller breaches this Clause.
The Supplier may provide marketing materials or support to the Reseller for [PRODUCT_NAME] under terms agreed separately between the Parties.
The Supplier shall not be liable for any representation, warranty, or conduct of the Reseller toward end customers that exceeds or contradicts the Supplier's official product documentation.
Either Party may terminate this Agreement without cause by giving [TERMINATION_NOTICE_PERIOD_DAYS] days' written notice.

Either Party may terminate this Agreement immediately by written notice if the other Party materially breaches this Agreement and fails to remedy the breach within [CURE_PERIOD_DAYS] days of receiving written notice.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation.

The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE]. Ambiguity: resale price guidance explicitly non-binding unless legally required, avoiding resale price maintenance issues flagged as a cross-jurisdiction concern. Duplication: none — Territory (geographic scope) vs Exclusive Territory (exclusivity condition) are distinct. Loophole closed: linked Exclusive Territory continuation directly to Minimum Sales performance, preventing a reseller from holding exclusivity indefinitely without performance. Contradiction: none between Brand Usage License and Quality Control — the latter is an explicit limitation on the former, not a conflicting grant. Missing protection: added Liability Clause disclaiming responsibility for reseller's independent representations, addressing Step 2 risk #6. Complexity: kept pricing flexible (wholesale price only) rather than dictating end-customer pricing structure. Enforceability: brand revocation right explicit and tied to a defined breach condition. Attack: Reseller claims exclusivity survives despite missing sales targets — mitigated by explicit conversion mechanism in Minimum Sales Clause. Attack: Reseller uses supplier's logo in a modified, unauthorized form — mitigated by Quality Control Clause granting explicit revocation right. Attack: End customer sues supplier over reseller's exaggerated marketing claim — mitigated by Reseller Independent Conduct liability clause. No further gaps found. Version 1.0.0 — Self-Review and Red Team passed — Pending Human Legal Review.
